org.springframework.data.relational.core.sql.Expression

Packages that use Expression
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.core
Core domain types around DatabaseClient.
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.query
Query and update support.
org.springframework.data.relational.core.sql
Statement Builder implementation.

  • Uses of Expression in org.springframework.data.r2dbc.query

    Methods in org.springframework.data.r2dbc.query that return Expression
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Expression
    QueryMapper.getMappedObject(Expression expression, @Nullable RelationalPersistentEntity<?> entity)
    Deprecated.
    since 4.0 in favor of QueryMapper.getMappedObjects(Expression, RelationalPersistentEntity) where usage of embeddable properties can return more than one mapped result.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.r2dbc.query that return types with arguments of type Expression
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Expression>
    QueryMapper.getMappedObjects(Expression expression, @Nullable RelationalPersistentEntity<?> entity)
    Map the Expression object to apply field name mapping using the type to read.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Expression
    QueryMapper.getMappedObject(Expression expression, @Nullable RelationalPersistentEntity<?> entity)
    Deprecated.
    since 4.0 in favor of QueryMapper.getMappedObjects(Expression, RelationalPersistentEntity) where usage of embeddable properties can return more than one mapped result.
    List<Expression>
    QueryMapper.getMappedObjects(Expression expression, @Nullable RelationalPersistentEntity<?> entity)
    Map the Expression object to apply field name mapping using the type to read.

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    Condition
    AST Segment for a condition.
    Classes in org.springframework.data.relational.core.sql that implement Expression
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AliasedExpression
    An expression with an alias.
    class 
    AnalyticFunction
    Represents an analytic function, also known as windowing function
    class 
    AndCondition
    Condition representing an AND relation between two Conditions.
    class 
    AsteriskFromTable
    Segment to select all columns from a Table.
    class 
    Between
    BETWEEN Condition comparing between Expressions.
    class 
    BindMarker
    Bind marker/parameter placeholder used to construct prepared statements with parameter substitution.
    class 
    BooleanLiteral
    Represents a Boolean literal.
    class 
    CaseExpression
    Case with one or more conditions expression.
    class 
    Cast
    Represents a CAST expression like CAST(something AS JSON.
    class 
    Column
    Column name within a SELECT … FROM clause.
    class 
    Comparison
    Comparing Condition comparing two Expressions.
    class 
    ConstantCondition
    Condition representing fixed sql predicate.
    static class 
    Expressions.SimpleExpression
     
    class 
    FalseCondition
    Simple condition that evaluates to SQL FALSE.
    class 
    In
    IN Condition clause.
    class 
    IsNull
    IS NULL Condition.
    class 
    Like
    LIKE Condition comparing two Expressions.
    class 
    Literal<T>
    Represents a literal.
    class 
    MultipleCondition
    Wrapper for multiple Conditions.
    class 
    NestedCondition
    Condition group wrapping a nested Condition with parentheses.
    class 
    Not
     
    class 
    NumericLiteral
    Represents a Number literal.
    class 
    OrCondition
    Condition representing an OR relation between two Conditions.
    class 
    SimpleFunction
    Simple function accepting one or more Expressions.
    class 
    StringLiteral
    Represents a CharSequence literal.
    class 
    SubselectExpression
    Wrapper for a Select query to be used as subselect.
    class 
    TrueCondition
    Simple condition that evaluates to SQL TRUE.
    class 
    TupleExpression
    A tuple as used for IN predicates.

    Creates a = (equals) Condition.

    Column.isEqualTo(Expression expression)
    Creates a = (equals) Condition.
    Comparison
    Column.isGreater(Expression expression)
    Creates a != (not equals) Condition.

    Conditions.isGreater(Expression leftColumnOrExpression, Expression rightColumnOrExpression)
    Creates a <= (greater ) Condition comparing left is greater than right.

    Column.isGreaterOrEqualTo(Expression expression)
    Creates a <= (greater or equal to) Condition.

    Conditions.isGreaterOrEqualTo(Expression leftColumnOrExpression, Expression rightColumnOrExpression)
    Creates a <= (greater or equal to) Condition comparing left is greater than or equal to right.
    Comparison
    Column.isLess(Expression expression)
    Creates a < (less) Condition.

    Creates a < (less) Condition comparing left is less than right.

    CCreates a <= (greater) Condition.
